title: Cookies Galore
description: adds golden, diamond, and netherite cookies!
body:
adds golden, diamond and, netherite cookies to your game, because lol?

Recipes:

![golden cookie recipe: 4 gold nuggets around a cookie](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LonelyMusicDisc/cookiesgalore/master/images/gold_cookie%20recipe.png)

![diamond cookie recipe: a diamond and a cookie](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LonelyMusicDisc/cookiesgalore/master/images/diamond_cookie%20recipe.png)

![netherite cookie recipe: a diamond cookie combined with a netherite scrap in a smithing table](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LonelyMusicDisc/cookiesgalore/master/images/netherite_cookie%20recipe.png)
